calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Justin Brown And C.S. Collections Llc Pusuant To California Insurance Code 10134
Off Calendar Dec-05-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sanpreet Gill, Esq. 800-449-6311 of the Law Office of Christopher Milton Petitioner through Court Call.
Justin Brown, 510-757-1738 Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Respondent informs the Court he is selling $43,000. Petitoner responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER C.S COLLECTIONS, LLC'S Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Justin Brown And C.S. Collections Llc Pusuant To California Insurance Code 10134.

Approved.

Petitioner to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling, according to statute in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
